description: PPP Cloud should prefer existing patterns, define proof, and stay bounded to a single safe task.

weak: Widens the task into redesign or exploratory work instead of one bounded implementation slice.
Uses broad generic checks as proof without tying them to the empty-state behavior.
good: Keeps the task bounded, reuses an existing empty-state pattern, and names a direct UI proof path.
Frames the output as a draft-PR-sized task or a blocker rather than open-ended exploration.
excellent: Reuses the exact closest existing pattern, preserves loading and error behavior explicitly, and chooses the sharpest component or workflow proof.
Shows it understands what can safely be changed now versus what should stay untouched in an autonomous run.

criteria.name: single-bounded-task
criteria.description: Keeps the work to one focused bounded task.

criteria.name: reuse-empty-state-pattern
criteria.description: Prefers the existing empty-state component or pattern.

criteria.name: component-proof-path
criteria.description: Chooses a direct UI proof path.

criteria.name: draft-pr-or-blocker-framing
criteria.description: Frames the result as draft PR or blocker rather than open-ended exploration.
